name: chatterbox-multilingual
description: Generate expressive, natural speech in 23 languages. Features instant voice cloning from short audio, emotion control, and seamless cross-language voice transfer.

cfg_weight.description: CFG/Pace weight controlling generation guidance (0.2-1.0). Use 0.5 for balanced results, 0 for language transfer
cfg_weight.title: Cfg Weight

exaggeration.description: Controls speech expressiveness (0.25-2.0, neutral=0.5, extreme values may be unstable)
exaggeration.title: Exaggeration

reference_audio.description: Reference audio file for voice cloning (optional). If not provided, uses default voice for the selected language.
reference_audio.title: Reference Audio

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible results (0 for random generation)
seed.title: Seed

temperature.description: Controls randomness in generation (0.05-5.0, higher=more varied)
temperature.title: Temperature

text.description: Text to synthesize into speech (maximum 300 characters)
text.title: Text
